entities.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, wet sneakers, cautious eyes
small gray cat with short fur, bright eyes, thin tail, expressive face, wet whiskers
quiet narrow city street at night, wet pavement, puddles, dim streetlights, shuttered shops
broken black umbrella lying on the wet ground, bent ribs, torn fabric

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a quiet rain-soaked city street at night, streetlights reflected in puddles, heavy diagonal rain creating a lonely mood.
The boy in a hooded raincoat walks alone along the wet sidewalk, head lowered against the rain, his reflection stretched in a puddle.
Close view of the boy stopping beside a broken umbrella on the ground, noticing faint movement in the shadow of a narrow alley.
A small gray cat steps out from the alley shadow, soaked by rain, staring directly at the boy with unusually intelligent eyes.
Reaction close-up of the boy frozen in surprise, rain dripping from his hood, eyes wide as the cat sits calmly before him.
The cat raises one paw like a tiny guide, standing beside a glowing puddle reflection under the streetlight while the boy crouches closer.
The boy follows the gray cat through the rain, both moving along a narrow lane between dark shopfronts, dramatic shadows stretching behind them.
At the end of the lane, the cat stops before a large puddle that reflects a moonlit gate not visible above, while the boy leans forward in awe.
Final dramatic shot: the boy and gray cat stand side by side before the shimmering puddle gate, rain swirling around them as if the night is opening.

text.content: 他们的雨夜冒险开始了。
